ops.title: Rewire show/sprint/project/doc onto notes.Client reverse-index methods; delete shared helpers
ops.description:
Follow-up to v0.31.0 (repo-utility commands → notes.Client). The remaining CLI commands that still read `*store.Store` directly for reverse indexes — `show`, `sprint`, `project`, `doc` (list/show) — should move onto the client methods `SprintTasks` / `ProjectSprints` / `ProjectTasks` / `TasksBlocking` / `AttachmentInfos` (all added in v0.31.0).

Once those are the only remaining users, delete the 6 now-dead shared helpers in `internal/cli`: `allTasks`, `blocksFor`, `entityAttachments`, `tasksInSprint`, `sprintsInProject`, `tasksInProject` (and `hierarchy.go`/`blockers.go` if they go empty). Then collapse more of the 73-site `openStoreClient` double-open — commands that no longer need `*store.Store` switch to `openClient()`.

Also migrate the 7 `relevant` edge-case tests kept in `internal/cli/relevant_test.go` (DetachedHead, AmbiguousHead, UnbornHead, MergedBranchRefDeleted, CrossAuthorExcludesSharedPath, RanksDocs, RanksLogs) into `notes/relevant_test.go`, thinning the CLI test to command-output only.

`resolveBlocker` (task-dep resolution) may still legitimately need the store — check before deleting `allTasks`.

See doc "Consolidate repo-utility logic into public notes.Client".

ops.text: show/sprint/project/doc read reverse indexes via notes.Client, not *store.Store
the 6 shared helpers (allTasks, blocksFor, entityAttachments, tasksInSprint, sprintsInProject, tasksInProject) are deleted
the 7 relevant edge tests are migrated from internal/cli/relevant_test.go to notes/relevant_test.go
go test -race -count=1 ./... is green and internal/cli goldens are byte-identical
